since_last: 40% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.12%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.34% · BTC -1.79% · Gold -1.20% · Nasdaq100 +0.09%. 40% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.12%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.12%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.95%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +11.52%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +11.52%, ANET +7.54%, AVGO +5.73%, SMCI +5.50%, AMBA +5.17%. Laggards: PANW -5.15%, UPST -4.14%, WDAY -4.02%, ZS -3.67%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.46% at $145.8
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.46% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
